---
title: "More betabinomial"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Prior

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}

qb_data_clean <- read_csv("./data/cleaned_data.csv")

mu <- mean(qb_data_clean$Comp_Percentage / 100)
var <- var(qb_data_clean$Comp_Percentage / 100)
alpha_prior <- mu * ((mu*(1-mu)/var) - 1)
beta_prior  <- (1-mu) * ((mu*(1-mu)/var) - 1)

mu
var
alpha_prior
beta_prior
```

```{r}
#Prior will be data from 2014 to 2024
prior_data <- qb_data_clean %>%
  filter(year< 2025)

prior_data <- prior_data %>%
  mutate(comp_prop = Comp_Percentage / 100)

mu_prior <- mean(prior_data$comp_prop)
var_prior <- var(prior_data$comp_prop)

scale <- (mu_prior * (1-mu_prior)/ var_prior) - 1
alpha_prior <- mu_prior * scale
beta_prior <- (1-mu_prior) * scale

cat("Beta Prior Parameters \n")
cat(sprintf("  Mean completion %%:  %.3f  (%.1f%%)\n", mu_prior, mu_prior * 100))
cat(sprintf("  Variance:           %.6f\n", var_prior))
cat(sprintf("  scale (strength):   %.2f\n", scale))
cat(sprintf("  alpha_prior:        %.4f\n", alpha_prior))
cat(sprintf("  beta_prior:         %.4f\n\n", beta_prior))
```

```{r}
year_sum <- prior_data %>%
  group_by(year)%>%
  summarise(
    n_qb = n(),
    mean_comp = mean(Comp_Percentage),
    sd_comp = sd(Comp_Percentage),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
year_sum
```

```{r}
prior_params <- tibble(
  alpha_prior = alpha_prior,
  beta_prior  = beta_prior,
  mu_prior    = mu_prior,
  var_prior   = var_prior,
  scale       = scale,
  n_seasons   = n_distinct(prior_data$year),
  n_qb_seasons = nrow(prior_data)
)
```

```{r}
x_seq <- seq(0.45, 0.85, length.out = 500)
prior_density <- dbeta(x_seq, alpha_prior, beta_prior)

prior_plot <- ggplot() +
  geom_line(
    aes(x = x_seq * 100, y = prior_density / 100),
    colour = "blue", linewidth = 1.2
  ) +
  geom_vline(
    xintercept = mu_prior * 100,
    linetype = "dashed", colour = "red", linewidth = 0.9
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Beta Prior Distribution for QB Completion Percentage",
    x     = "Completion Percentage",
    y     = "Density"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)

prior_plot
```

## Posterior

```{r}
qbs_2025 <- qb_data_clean %>%
  filter(year == 2025) %>%
  mutate(
    Incompletions = Attempts - Completions,
    alpha_post = alpha_prior + Completions,
    beta_post = beta_prior  + Incompletions,
    post_mean = alpha_post / (alpha_post + beta_post),
    post_mode = (alpha_post - 1) / (alpha_post + beta_post - 2),
    post_var = (alpha_post * beta_post) /
                       ((alpha_post + beta_post)^2 * (alpha_post + beta_post + 1)),
    post_sd = sqrt(post_var),
    ci_lower         = qbeta(0.025, alpha_post, beta_post),
    ci_upper         = qbeta(0.975, alpha_post, beta_post)
  )

```

```{r}
qbs_2025 %>%
  arrange(desc(post_mean)) %>%
  select(Player, Attempts, Completions, Comp_Percentage,
         post_mean, post_sd, ci_lower, ci_upper) %>%
  mutate(across(c(post_mean, post_sd, ci_lower, ci_upper), ~ round(. * 100, 2))) %>%
  rename(
    `Obs Comp%`   = Comp_Percentage,
    `Post Mean%`  = post_mean,
    `Post SD%`    = post_sd,
    `CI 2.5%`     = ci_lower,
    `CI 97.5%`    = ci_upper
  )
```

```{r}
compare_qbs <- function(player_a, player_b, n_sim = 100000, data = qbs_2025) {

  p_a <- filter(data, Player == player_a)
  p_b <- filter(data, Player == player_b)

  draws_a <- rbeta(n_sim, p_a$alpha_post, p_a$beta_post)
  draws_b <- rbeta(n_sim, p_b$alpha_post, p_b$beta_post)

  prob_a_better <- mean(draws_a > draws_b)


  cat(sprintf("\n=== %s  vs.  %s ===\n", player_a, player_b))
  cat(sprintf("  %-25s  Post Mean = %.1f%%  95%% CI: [%.1f%%, %.1f%%]\n",
              player_a,
              p_a$post_mean * 100,
              p_a$ci_lower  * 100,
              p_a$ci_upper  * 100))
  cat(sprintf("  %-25s  Post Mean = %.1f%%  95%% CI: [%.1f%%, %.1f%%]\n",
              player_b,
              p_b$post_mean * 100,
              p_b$ci_lower  * 100,
              p_b$ci_upper  * 100))
  cat(sprintf("  P(%s more accurate) = %.1f%%\n",
              player_a, prob_a_better * 100))
  cat(sprintf("  P(%s more accurate) = %.1f%%\n",
              player_b, (1 - prob_a_better) * 100))
    invisible(list(
    player_a     = player_a,
    player_b     = player_b,
    prob_a_better = prob_a_better,
    draws_a      = draws_a,
    draws_b      = draws_b
  ))
}
```

```{r}
cat("2025 QBs available:\n")
cat(paste(sort(qbs_2025$Player), collapse = ", "), "\n\n")

# Run a few head-to-head comparisons
compare_qbs("Patrick Mahomes", "Josh Allen")
compare_qbs("Lamar Jackson",   "Joe Burrow")
compare_qbs("Tua Tagovailoa",  "Patrick Mahomes")
```

```{r}
cleaned_data
```

\
